name: Author Bio
description: Learn about the author's journey through philosophical study and the vision behind this exploration of Hindu thought. Decades of research and reflection inform every chapter.
alt: Author of Core Concepts in Hindu Philosophy

name: Book Synopsis
description: A comprehensive guide to the core concepts that form the foundation of Hindu philosophy—from Vedic wisdom to contemporary interpretations. Accessible yet rigorous.
alt: Open book symbolising knowledge and philosophical study

name: Book Promotion
description: Exclusive previews, chapter insights, and discussions about Hindu philosophy. Stay updated on talks, events, and engagement opportunities with readers worldwide.
alt: Book promotion and reader engagement events
